RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0006 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Omar Okafor Date of Birth: 26/07/1965 SSN (tokenized): [REDACTED] Annual Income: $146,000 Loan Amount: $54,000 Branch: Berlin Employment: [x] Full-time [ ] Self-employed Housing: [x] Own [x] Rent Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN58730AL Toyota Model 3 2018 ICE New 51,000 VIN63573AL Tesla Model 3 2019 EV Used 36,000 Authorized Signature: Omar Okafor
